case_title: SANTOS FAUSTO ECHEVARRIA COCOM VS. JOSE TOBIAS MARTINEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,255.00 FILED BY ECHEVARRIA COCOM, SANTOS FAUSTO AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JOSE TOBIAS LOZANO, YESENIA LUNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
